data.name: Northwind Robotics
data.profile_summary: Northwind Robotics builds autonomous warehouse robots for mid-size European 3PLs. ~140 people, Series B, selling through a direct sales team that doubled in the last year. Heavy outbound motion, growing RevOps function, HubSpot and a patchwork of spreadsheets for pipeline reporting.

data.name: LumenPay
data.profile_summary: LumenPay is a B2B payments platform for marketplaces, ~65 people, Series A. Product-led with a young outbound team; the growth lead posts publicly about pipeline chaos and tool sprawl. Salesforce, Outreach, no dedicated ops hire yet.

data.name: Harborline Logistics
data.profile_summary: Harborline sells freight-visibility software to ocean carriers, ~220 people across Rotterdam and Gdansk. Mature mid-market sales org with four regional teams, long cycles, and an ops group that owns forecasting. Salesforce shop, recently consolidated EU entities.

data.summary: Northwind Robotics raised a EUR 40M Series B led by HV Capital to expand its European go-to-market.
Northwind Robotics opened a Head of Revenue Operations role — the second ops hire this quarter.
LumenPay's Head of Growth posted about pipeline reporting breaking down across three tools.
Firmographic refresh: 140 FTE (up from 95), Munich HQ, industrial-automation; confirmed HubSpot stack.
Initial enrichment from CSV import: 220 FTE, Rotterdam HQ, freight-visibility SaaS, Salesforce stack.

data.why_now: Growth lead is publicly complaining about pipeline reporting breaking down across three tools.
data.rationale: Good ICP fit (B2B, outbound motion, no ops hire) but a lone social signal — nurture, not first touch.

data.why_now: Raised a EUR 40M Series B and opened a Head of RevOps role in the same week — budget plus a mandate.
data.rationale: Strong ICP fit; funding + job signals clustered in one run; no prior touches.

data.subject: Your second ops hire this quarter
data.body: Saw Northwind opened a Head of Revenue Operations role — second ops hire this quarter, right after the Series B. Teams at that point usually hit the wall where pipeline truth lives in five spreadsheets. We help RevOps leads consolidate that in their first 90 days. Worth fifteen minutes next week, or should I send the one-pager?
